Requires at least: 6.0
Tested up to: 6.5
Requires PHP: 8.1
Stable tag: 1.2.3

Donate link: https://example.com/donate

A concise description of what this plugin does.

== Description ==

This plugin does amazing things with the WordPress REST API.

It supports:

* Feature one
* Feature two
* Feature three

== Installation ==

1. Upload the plugin files to `/wp-content/plugins/my-awesome-plugin`.
2. Activate the plugin through the **Plugins** screen in WordPress.
3. Configure via **Settings → My Awesome Plugin**.

== Frequently Asked Questions ==

= Does it work with multisite? =

Yes, it is fully multisite-compatible.

= What PHP version is required? =

PHP 8.1 or higher is required.

== Changelog ==

= 1.2.3 =
* Fixed a bug with REST API authentication.
* Improved performance.

= 1.0.0 =
* Initial release.

== Upgrade Notice ==

= 1.2.3 =
Minor bug fixes — safe to upgrade.
